pricing.comments: Usage billed in Hardware Quantum Credits: HQC = 5 + C*(N1q + 10*N2q + 5*Nm)/5000. Standard/Premium subscriptions + pay-as-you-go per HQC. Via Azure Quantum roughly $500 per 40 HQC; direct rates via Quantinuum sales.

theoretical_max.caveat: Rough headroom proxy only: conflates circuit width (N) with depth (1/eps). Not a substitute for measured Quantum Volume.

pricing.comments: Amazon Braket on-demand: $0.08/shot + $0.30/task. Error-mitigated runs require a minimum of 2,500 shots/task.

pricing.comments: Pay-as-you-go ~$1.60/sec ($96/min QPU time). Volume plans: Flex $72/min, Premium (5,200 min/yr) $48/min. Same rate across all Heron systems.
